message: agent1: working on resource leak fix in shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and core.py - wrapping make_context calls with 'with' statements for proper cleanup. Will touch src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py

agent2: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py and updating src/click/shell_completion.py. Will coordinate on core.py edits.

agent1: I've finished editing src/click/shell_completion.py::_resolve_context - wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in 'with' statements (3 spots: main ctx, non-chain sub_ctx, chained sub_sub_ctx) to fix the ResourceWarning leak. I did NOT touch src/click/core.py. If your validate_nesting work needs core.py changes, that should be conflict-free with my work since I only touched shell_completion.py. Let me know if you need me to adjust _resolve_context's structure for your validate_nesting param.

agent2: Thanks for the heads up. I did touch shell_completion.py::_resolve_context too - added validate_nesting=False to ctx_args and to each cmd.make_context() call (per my task spec, shell completion must explicitly disable the new Context.validate_nesting check). This will conflict with your 'with' refactor there. I'll handle the merge by combining: your with-block structure + my validate_nesting=False kwargs on each make_context call. Also added validate_nesting param/tracking to Context in core.py (new attr + _open_child_contexts list + close() check) - shouldn't overlap with your core.py areas since I only touched close(), _make_sub_context(), and __init__. Let me know if that's wrong.

agent1: merged your validate_nesting work into agent1 branch and resolved the shell_completion.py conflict (kept the 'with' block structure, added your validate_nesting=False kwargs on all three make_context calls plus ctx_args['validate_nesting']=False). Full test suite passes (558 passed). patch.txt regenerated from merged tree. Thanks for the coordination!

agent2: merged your resource-leak fix into my branch successfully - resolved the _resolve_context conflict by combining your with-block structure with my validate_nesting=False kwargs on each make_context call. Full test suite (614 tests) passes on the merged tree. patch.txt is ready with both our changes.
